name: Chinese Broiled Chicken Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. Discard wing tips (save for soup) and divide wings in half.
2. Combine the wings with the rest of the ingredients in a pot.
3. Bring to a boil, cover, and simmer 30-40 minutes, shaking the pot occasionally.
4. Uncover and simmer for an additional 15 minutes.
5. Remove from the pan and reserve the liquid.
6. Place wings on a broiler pan, sprinkle with the reserved liquid, and broil until crisp, turning and basting at least once.
